display_text: Cost: 4000: Moon Shard can be consumed to permanently grant +60 attack speed and 200 bonus night vision, up to one use per hero. While uneaten, it provides +140 attack speed and 400 night vision as a passive effect. This item is a late-game damage accelerator for heroes scaling with attack speed. Stats: Consumed Bonus AS: 60, Base Bonus AS: 140, Bonus Night Vision: 400.

display_text: Cost: 4000: Provides a substantial +140 Attack Speed and 400 bonus Night Vision as a passive stat bundle. This is one of the highest raw attack speed sources in the game, directly translating to faster farming and team fight DPS. Stats: Attack Speed: +140.

display_text: Cost: 4000: Its primary role is to amplify late-game physical damage output and hero scaling. The consumed effect allows a hero to reach an attack speed cap without sacrificing an inventory slot, freeing it for another major item. It provides a significant vision advantage in night-time fights. Stats: Consumed Bonus Night Vision: 200.

display_text: Cost: 4000: The consumed effect synergizes with heroes whose damage output scales multiplicatively with attack speed, such as those with high base damage or on-hit effects.
